Interface INumericFormat

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that format numbers.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("7E4F4710-8E54-11D2-AAD8-000000000000")]
public interface INumericFormat

Properties

AlignmentOption

The alignment option applied to the ValueToString method.

esriNumericAlignmentEnum AlignmentOption { get; set; }

Property Value

esriNumericAlignmentEnum

Examples

Sample Snippet

AlignmentWidth

The alignment width applied to the ValueToString method.

int AlignmentWidth { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

RoundingOption

The rounding option applied to the ValueToString method.

esriRoundingOptionEnum RoundingOption { get; set; }

Property Value

esriRoundingOptionEnum

Examples

Sample Snippet

RoundingValue

The rounding value, whose meaning depends on the rounding option.

int RoundingValue { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

ShowPlusSign

Indicates if formatted numbers contain a plus sign for positive numbers.

bool ShowPlusSign { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

UseSeparator

Indicates if formatted numbers contain digit grouping symbols.

bool UseSeparator { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ZeroPad

Indicates if formatted numbers contain padded zeros to the right of the decimal.

bool ZeroPad { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
